tasks.title: Create ADR documenting READ COMMITTED + FOR UPDATE design decision
tasks.description:
Create ADR in docs/decisions/ documenting the accepted design decision to use READ COMMITTED isolation level with FOR UPDATE row locks for billing transactions, rather than SERIALIZABLE.

Cover:
- Why READ COMMITTED is sufficient
- How FOR UPDATE provides needed guarantees
- Trade-offs vs SERIALIZABLE
- Performance implications

subtasks.title: Write ADR with context, decision, and consequences
